title: Game Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android
display_title: Game Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android
wikitext:
[]: [Game] Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Thu Feb 15, 2018 10:57 am If this threads been done already I apologise in advance but is anyone out there playing ether of these Evangelion mobile games? Neon Genesis Evangelion :Online https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1IkKvYsugQg&ab_channel=rendermax https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.heartsnet.evaol.gp&hl=en_GB Neon Genesis Evangelion : Dawn https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IsSnn5esps8&ab_channel=clairerubejes https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.qzgame.eva.google&hl=en Just wondered as I've been playing Evangelion online myself and have found it really fun

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Thu Feb 15, 2018 11:36 am Online is pretty fun at first, but soon becomes a vicious cycle of do a level, collect your loot, upgrade your shit, do a level. I haven't heard of Dawn until a few seconds ago but judging by the footage, it looks awesome! Of course, not canon or at all accurate even to New Theatrical, but an Evangelion-themed character action beat-em-up seems badass.

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Thu Feb 15, 2018 11:46 am AdamMalkobitch wrote: Online is pretty fun at first, but soon becomes a vicious cycle of do a level, collect your loot, upgrade your shit, do a level. I haven't heard of Dawn until a few seconds ago but judging by the footage, it looks awesome! Of course, not canon or at all accurate even to New Theatrical, but an Evangelion-themed character action beat-em-up seems badass.

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Feb 16, 2018 3:22 pm I dont have enough memory space on my phone to actually play it myself (and no time either), but I very much enjoy watching some Eva: Dawn videos when lazing around

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Wed Feb 21, 2018 12:48 pm Dawn is goddamn amazing, I'm having so much fun with it. My favorite part right now is all the different pilots and Evangelions. Not only are there the original six New Theatrical pilots, there's also Misato, Hikari, and even a young Mari. I especially love scrolling through all the Evangelions, as there's both Neon Genesis and New Theatrical models, even ones like Jet Alone, the Eva Series, or Provisional Unit 05. There are even brand new Evangelions I've never seen before, such as Unit 01 in this weird orange armour, or some sort of Eva Series-lookin redesign with an enormous red core for an abdomen, which looks strangely similar to the mass produced Unit 06's seen in the preview for FINAL seen at the end of Q.

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Feb 21, 2018 4:14 pm This video shows off all the currently available mecha and links to a chart that helps identify them. Most of the ones that might look unfamiliar are from Anima .

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Wed Mar 07, 2018 6:14 am Update Evangelion online has sadly folded as the Japanese did not renew the contract I don't know if Dawn has had the same fate though I'm hearing rumours that its broken and keeps crashing.

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Mar 07, 2018 11:34 am silvermoonlight wrote: Update Evangelion online has sadly folded as the Japanese did not renew the contract I don't know if Dawn has had the same fate though I'm hearing rumours that its broken and keeps crashing.

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Apr 01, 2018 10:45 am So I just downloaded Dawn the other day and it seems to be running just fine. Gameplay is pretty straightforward, and for the rest its basically guesswork and trial and error

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Apr 04, 2018 4:02 pm Reichu wrote: This video shows off all the currently available mecha and links to a chart that helps identify them. Most of the ones that might look unfamiliar are from Anima .

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Wed Apr 04, 2018 7:18 pm Reichu wrote: This video shows off all the currently available mecha and links to a chart that helps identify them. Most of the ones that might look unfamiliar are from Anima .

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Apr 05, 2018 2:25 pm DarkBluePhoenix wrote: Looked like we missed some interesting stuff in Anima.

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 05, 2018 2:39 pm Blockio wrote: I want to catch up on it without having to learn Japanese in order to do so

[]: Re: Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Apr 05, 2018 3:11 pm Reichu wrote: And I want to go down two sizes without having to change my diet or do any exercise. But that doesn't yield results, so... If you really want something, you'll do something you don't want to do in order to attain it.

[]: Re: [Game] Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat May 05, 2018 5:43 pm Welp, my savefile on Eva Dawn is gone... any idea on how to restore it? EDIT: Nevermind, I just clicked on another savefile option and went into blind panic mode because I lost a number of mobile game saves before

[]: Re: [Game] Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu May 24, 2018 12:17 pm So after the recent update, Eva:Dawn has brought in a few... questionable... designs. Namely Unit 00 Type F Allegorica (yes, complete with ridiculous color scheme and ass-attachment), Godzilla Unit 01 and JEt Alone Kai/Prime/2/Improved/Whatever you wanna call it (now that one would actually be really sweet, if they didnt completely butcher its appearance), and worst of all, the one and only... Crimson A1. To make matters even worse, its in the rarest and most powerful class of the game, and wields two gigantic axes.

[]: Re: [Game] Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu May 24, 2018 8:00 pm What did they do to the Jet Alone 2?

[]: Re: [Game] Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 24, 2018 9:54 pm Blockio wrote: JEt Alone Kai/Prime/2/Improved/Whatever you wanna call it

[]: Re: [Game] Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Fri May 25, 2018 3:15 pm Okay so Valkyrie Connect a new mobile game has an Evangelion cross over which is kind of fun https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=jp.co.atm.vcon.ww&hl=en_GB https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DfMo31Mk39g&ab_channel=LooselyLucy

[]: Re: [Game] Evangelion Online Mobile Games Android.             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun May 27, 2018 2:45 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: What did they do to the Jet Alone 2?
